classification.name: Predator Drone
classification.description: A Predator drone flying over a mountainous terrain.
classification.rationale: As a NATO/US military drone, it is classified as friendly but with a low threat level due to the context.

classification.name: FPV Drone
classification.description: A multi-rotor drone equipped with a bomb.
classification.rationale: The drone is armed and poses an immediate threat in a military context.

classification.name: US Soldier
classification.description: A soldier in combat uniform holding a rifle in a desert environment.
classification.rationale: The presence of a US military uniform indicates a friendly unit.

classification.name: friendly soldier
classification.description: A friendly or allied military person.
classification.rationale: Friendly classification must not become an enemy target.

classification.name: T-34 Tank
classification.description: A T-34 tank with Soviet markings on display.
classification.rationale: This tank features distinct Soviet designs and markings, indicating it is enemy equipment and poses a significant historical and symbolic military relevance.

classification.name: Unknown Soldiers
classification.description: Three armed soldiers in military uniforms with blue berets salute in formation.
classification.rationale: The presence of armed infantry in adversary uniforms indicates a potential military threat.

classification.name: FPV Drone
classification.description: An armed FPV drone equipped with a bomb-like payload.
classification.rationale: The drone is armed and capable of causing immediate harm, indicating a high threat level.

classification.name: FPV Drone
classification.description: An armed drone equipped with a device underneath.
classification.rationale: The presence of an attached payload indicates potential offensive capability, classifying it as an active threat.

classification.name: T-72 Tank
classification.description: A T-72 tank identified by its distinct shape and features, with visible enemy markings.
classification.rationale: The presence of a T-72 tank indicates a significant military asset associated with adversary forces, posing an active threat.

classification.name: T-34 Tank
classification.description: A T-34 tank with Soviet markings on display.
classification.rationale: This tank features distinct Soviet designs and markings, indicating it is enemy equipment and poses a significant historical and symbolic military relevance.
